generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our allies are actually costing us more than they contribute? While we're over here footing the bill for collective defense, some of our 'partners' are barely pulling their weight. It's time we demand fair burden-sharing or reconsider these one-sided commitments. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
